title: satureja rotundifolia var. micrantha
intro: Satureja rotundifolia var. micrantha, commonly known as the small-leaved savory, is a perennial herb of the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Satureja rotundifolia var. micrantha include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce stress and anxiety. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
